title: Drip vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Drip and Sendinblue email marketing tools. Pricing, features, and ratings to help you choose the right platform.
h1: Drip vs Sendinblue: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Drip and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different priorities. Drip focuses on e-commerce automation with deep store integration, while Sendinblue offers a broader all-in-one CRM suite with generous free tier limits. This comparison helps you identify which platform aligns best with your business needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce businesses with deep store integration needs
comparison_table.tool_b: Transactional email and multi-channel CRM campaigns

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce tracking, revenue attribution, visual automation, SMS, onsite campaigns
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, built-in CRM, chat support

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store and need advanced revenue tracking and attribution
You want specialized automation features designed specifically for online retailers
You're willing to pay premium pricing for deep Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar integrations
choose_b_if: You want a free tier with no credit card required to get started
You need multi-channel marketing (email, SMS, WhatsApp, chat) in one platform
You prioritize transactional email capabilities and integrated CRM features

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Drip excels for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced store integrations and revenue tracking. Sendinblue (Brevo) is superior for general marketing, multi-channel campaigns, and businesses on tight budgets. Sendinblue also has better overall user ratings on both G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Drip or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper, offering a free tier with up to 100k subscribers and 300 emails daily. Paid plans start at $25/month. Drip has no free option and starts at $39/month. For budget-conscious businesses, Sendinblue is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Drip?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and import capabilities. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contact lists, and many provide migration assistance. However, you'll need to manually rebuild automation workflows and customize settings to match Drip's e-commerce-focused features.
